specializations: Sustainable synthetic biology platform for beauty ingredients
product_highlights: Neossance® Squalane — 100% sugarcane-derived squalane via precision fermentation, globally the gold standard bio-based squalane
Neossance® Hemisqualane — lightweight bio-based silicone alternative with superior sensory profile
Purecane™ CBG — biosynthetic cannabigerol produced via precision fermentation, 99.9% purity
β-Farnesene platform — scalable fermentation substrate enabling diverse cosmetic ingredient production
notes: Amyris is a California-based synthetic biology pioneer that has redefined sustainable cosmetic ingredient production through precision fermentation. Their flagship product, Neossance® Squalane, is produced by fermenting sugarcane-derived sugars using engineered yeast, delivering a 100% plant-based, non-shark-derived squalane that has become the global benchmark for bio-based emolliency. Amyris's fermentation platform also enables the production of hemisqualane (a biodegradable silicone alternative), biosynthetic CBG, and bisabolol at commercial scale. Their approach dramatically reduces the land use, water consumption, and carbon footprint of traditionally extracted cosmetic ingredients.
